risk_note: Release pipeline + updater asset resolution. Risk concentrated in CI matrix correctness and the updater finding the macOS asset. OS-level signing (Apple notarization / Windows cert) is DEFERRED behind a human gate (no certs yet) — bundles ship unsigned.

rigor_applied.iprev_schedule: DEFERRED until platform-compile is shipped. Then run iprev for the four sibling changes (proc/desktop/ipc/bundle-ci) in ONE parallel pass — they depend only on platform-compile (whose shipped decisions stabilize cargo check --target + the CI gate) and not on each other for plan review. NOTE: bundle-ci EXECUTES last (needs the app running on macOS), but its PLAN can be iprev-reviewed in the same pass. Decided 2026-06-26.

interview_answers.signing: DEFERRED — no Apple Developer account ($99/yr) nor Windows code-signing cert. macOS bundles ship UNSIGNED (Gatekeeper warning); Tauri updater key still signs update artifacts for integrity. Apple notarization + Windows signing = human-gated follow-up.
interview_answers.arch: darwin-aarch64 only (no universal binary, no Intel) for the first iteration

human_gate.blocks_phase: signing-only (the rest of C ships unsigned)

events.note: proposal+specs(platform-distribution + release-ci-signed delta)+design+implementation+tasks authored; signing deferred section included; openspec validate --strict passed

R1 REVISE (2C/2H/3M/2L): category invalid under bundle.macOS (additionalProperties:false breaks build all-platforms); 'no frontend changes' false (deb-only gate + sourceLabel map + missing TS dmg fields -> added Phase 2B); latest.json darwin url must be .app.tar.gz not .dmg; v-prefix consistency (D2); smoke-test --prerelease guard (D7); download-artifact path resolution (D8); testable install_source_for_path seam. R2 APPROVED with 1M/2L residuals (upload-artifact LCA path -> own-named single-file fragment artifacts; dynamic macOS tarball name; banner-sentence qualifier) all fixed. validate --strict green throughout.

scope_note: Adds macOS packaging (.dmg/.app/.app.tar.gz.sig) + CI build matrix (ubuntu + macos runners) + multi-target latest.json + updater macOS asset resolution. Last in sequence (depends on the crate actually working on macOS). Signing deferred behind human gate.
